column8: Maria was lying on her bed reading quietly. All ofa sudden, she heard the strangest noise, which sounded something like insects,_____________from living room. (COME)
column9: Initially, she tried to ignore it but it just became more and more annoying. So, finally she____________to investigate. (GO)
column10: There in the living room, on the coffee table, was her laptop. On the screen, a pop-up advent_____________, probably half an hour earlier, for a game with thousands of crickets. With one quick click, there was place and quiet in the house again. (APPEAR)
column11: Elton John is an extremely famous British pop star. People all around the world______________of him, but not so many know that his official title is Sir Elton John? How did he become "Sir Elton"? (HEAR)
column12: In past centuries, only successful military commanders and politicians_________________the title for services to their country. However, in 1917, the British government decided to extend the title to other citizens. (AWARD)
column13: To become a Sir, you have to "receive a knighthood", an honour only even______________to men. However, many women, such as Judi Dench and Julie Andrews, have the equivalent title for females, which is "Dame". (GIVE)
column14: When a person becomes a Sir or a Dame, they can add this title to their name. It's one of the_______________honours a person can receive in the UK. (GREAT)
